right command (query) but args missing/wrong: SELECT 
    source_kind,
    strftime('%Y-%m', created_at) as month,
    COUNT(*) as fragment_count
FROM fragments 
GROUP BY source_kind, strftime('%Y-%m', created_at)
ORDER BY month DESC, source_kind
